name: Spinach and New Potatoes
recipeIngredient: homemade pimento cheese or grated sharp cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the new potatoes with their skin on until tender.
2. Remove from heat and allow them to cool slightly.
3. Prepare the spinach by washing and steaming in a pan covered with a lid until wilted.
4. To make the sauce, melt butter in a pan.
5. Add dry chicken bouillon and season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Gradually add flour until fully incorporated.
7. Slowly incorporate evaporated milk while stirring continuously.
8. Stir in nutmeg, thyme, sour cream, and additional seasoning.
9. Peel the cooled potatoes and layer them alternately with spinach and sauce in a casserole dish.
10. Top with sliced onions drizzled with olive oil and sesame oil.
11. Create a ring of pimento cheese on top, garnishing with seasoned bread crumbs both inside and outside the ring.
12. Heat until serving.
